name: @itsflower/cli
description: 🌸 flower CLI — scaffold structured development workflows

scripts.prepack: npm run build && rm -f templates && cp -r ../../core/templates templates && rm -rf skills && cp -r ../../core/skills skills && rm -rf commands && cp -r ../../core/commands commands
scripts.postpack: rm -rf templates && ln -s ../../core/templates templates && rm -rf skills commands
